title: Last Death Coords
description: Never lose your items again! Displays your death coordinates in chat with a simple toggle command.
body:
#   Last Death Coords
Last Dead Coords is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that shows your exact death coordinates instantly when you die.





Never lose your items again — your last death location is displayed clearly in chat and on the death screen.

---

## ✨ Features

✔ Displays precise X, Y, Z coordinates when you die  
✔ Sends formatted death location message in chat  
✔ Shows coordinates directly on the death screen  
✔ Toggle the feature anytime with a simple command  
✔ Automatically saves your setting in a config file  
✔ Client-side only (no server installation required)  
✔ Lightweight and performance-friendly  

---

## 🧭 How It Works

When the player dies:
- The mod detects the exact block position.
- It formats the coordinates clearly.
- It displays them in:
  - 💬 Chat
  - 💀 Death screen overlay

If disabled, the mod will not show any death coordinates.

---

## 🛠 Commands

### `/deathcoords on`
Enables the death coordinate display feature.

### `/deathcoords off`
Disables the death coordinate display feature.

The selected option is saved automatically and will remain active even after restarting the game.

---



## 🎮 Compatibility

✔ Works in Singleplayer  
✔ Works on Multiplayer servers (client-side only)  
✔ Compatible with other Fabric mods  
✔ Does NOT require server installation  

---

## 💡 Why Use This Mod?

Vanilla Minecraft does not clearly show your death location.  
This mod makes item recovery quick, easy, and stress-free — especially useful for:

• Survival Worlds  
• Hardcore Mode  
• Large Exploration Worlds  
• Multiplayer Servers  

---

Simple. Clean. Useful.
⚙️ Lightweight, Fabric-compatible

## 🌐 Links

💡 Quick Tip
Use the command:

/deathpoints on /deathpoints off

To turn the feature on or off whenever you like!
